title: Super Creek's Training Ground
statement: Super Creek has built a training course shaped like a tree of n checkpoints rooted at checkpoint 1. Each checkpoint has a stamina value.

Goldship keeps asking: "if I ran through every checkpoint in your subtree starting from u, how much total stamina would I need?" Answer each of Goldship's q questions. She has a 0.3 second attention span so you better be fast.
input_format: The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 10<sup>4</sup>), the number of test cases.

Each test case begins with two integers n and q. The next line contains n integers s<sub>1</sub>, s<sub>2</sub>, ..., s<sub>n</sub>, the stamina values. The next n-1 lines each contain two integers u and v describing an undirected tree edge (1 ≤ u, v ≤ n, u ≠ v). The next q lines each contain a single integer u (1 ≤ u ≤ n), a query node.
output_format: For each query, print the total stamina sum over the subtree of u.
constraints: Nodes are numbered 1 to n (1-indexed). Edges are undirected.
1 ≤ u, v ≤ n for each edge, u ≠ v
Sum of n and sum of q across all test cases ≤ 2×10<sup>5</sup>
